page.catalogHint: Designs use scraped inventory only; products are matched automatically from your prompt.
page.localCatalogEmpty: Local mode requires products in our catalog. Add items from search or try a different prompt — generation cannot use off-catalog furniture.
page.gatewayTimeout: Generation took too long and timed out. Wait about two minutes, then try again. If it keeps happening, use a shorter prompt or pick a few catalog products first.
page.cloudflareSecurityCheck: Security check required — please reload the page and try again.

page.polygonFootprintHint: Edit each wall segment — corners A, B, C… match the diagram above.
page.openingBoxesHint: Adjust the marked windows and doors so they sit exactly over the real openings — drag to move, drag the corner to resize.

page.shapeCreativityHint: 5 is the recommended balance. Lower values lock room geometry more; higher values allow bolder design.

project.editPlanSidebarHint: Each room side is lettered A–B, B–C… on the plan — type a length to set that wall · drag corners to reshape · tap an edge ✛ to add a corner. Use "Add window"/"Add door" then click a wall to place openings · drag them along the wall · press Delete to remove the selected corner, opening, or room.
project.confirmRoomHint: Drag any that are wrong, then confirm.

meta.title: Vista — Interior Design
meta.description: Design your room with real furniture from Armenian marketplaces.

pwa.iosTitle: Add Vista to your home screen
pwa.iosSteps: Tap the Share button in your browser, then choose Add to Home Screen.

modeHub.quickSubtitle: Ready-made design for a single room. Get precise furniture and finishes in minutes.
modeHub.projectSubtitle: All rooms as one complete interior — furniture and finishes for every room at once.

landing.headline: One room or the whole apartment:
landing.quickCardDesc: Ready-made design for a single room. Get precise furniture and finishes in minutes.
landing.projectCardDesc: All rooms as one complete interior — furniture and finishes for every room at once.

about.title: About Vista
about.metaDescription: Vista is Tunzone's interior design app. Upload a room photo, get photorealistic redesigns with real purchasable furniture.
about.intro: Vista is Tunzone's consumer interior design app. Upload a photo of your room, and we create photorealistic redesigned images featuring real, purchasable furniture from local Armenian stores — no designer appointment needed.
about.value1Desc: Photorealistic room redesigns from your photos. Upload a photo and describe your style.
about.value2Desc: Every piece of furniture in your design is real — sourced from Armenian retailers with direct purchase links.
about.value3Desc: Get a professional-quality interior design in minutes, not weeks. No consultations, no waitlists.
about.companyBlock: Vista is built by Tunzone in Yerevan, Armenia. Tunzone also offers a B2B 3D furniture platform for brands.
about.contactDesc: Have questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.

features.title: Features
features.metaDescription: Vista features: room redesign, real catalog furniture, Quick Room & Full Project modes, and chat editing.
features.subtitle: Everything you need to redesign your space with real furniture.
features.roomUploadDesc: Take a photo with your phone or upload from your gallery. Vista analyzes your room's layout, dimensions, and existing features automatically.
features.aiRedesignDesc: Vista generates photorealistic images of your room with new furniture and finishes. The result looks like a professional interior design render.
features.realFurnitureDesc: Designs feature real products from Armenian retailers — sofas, tables, chairs, lighting, and decor you can actually buy, with direct store links.
features.quickRoomDesc: Single room redesign in about 18 minutes. Upload one photo, get a complete design with matched furniture.
features.fullProjectDesc: Redesign your whole apartment at once. Upload a floor plan and room photos, get a coordinated interior for every room.
features.chatEditDesc: Not happy with something? Describe changes in plain language — 'make the sofa blue' or 'add a floor lamp' — and Vista regenerates with your feedback.
features.catalogSearchDesc: Browse and pin specific products from our marketplace into your design. Search by category, style, or keyword.
features.payPerDesignDesc: No monthly subscription. Top up your balance when you need more designs.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.metaDescription: Common questions about Vista interior design: how it works, supported stores, and more.
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about using Vista for interior design.
faq.a1: Vista is an interior design app by Tunzone. Upload a photo of your room, and we generate photorealistic redesigned images using real furniture from local Armenian stores. You can buy every piece shown in the design.
faq.q2: How does interior design with Vista work?
faq.a2: Upload a room photo, choose a style or describe what you want, and Vista analyzes your space — detecting walls, windows, doors, and dimensions. It then generates a new design with real furniture matched from our catalog, producing a photorealistic render of your redesigned room.
faq.q3: What is the difference between Quick Room and Full Project?
faq.a3: Quick Room redesigns a single room from one photo (~18 minutes). Full Project handles your entire apartment — upload a floor plan and photos of all rooms, and Vista creates a coordinated design for each room (5+ rooms).
faq.a4: Create a free account, upload a room photo or floor plan, and generate your first design. You can top up your balance anytime when you need more designs.
faq.a5: Yes, signup is free. You get 20 free tokens on your first visit to try Vista. Invite friends to earn 20 tokens each when they join.
faq.q6: Does Vista use real furniture I can buy?
faq.a6: Yes. Every product in your design is sourced from real Armenian retailers. Each item includes a direct link to the store where you can purchase it.
faq.q7: Which stores and markets are supported?
faq.a7: Vista currently features furniture and decor from Armenian marketplace retailers including local furniture stores. We're continuously expanding our catalog.
faq.a8: No. There is no monthly subscription. Top up your balance when you need more designs and use it at your own pace.
faq.q9: Can I edit a design after generation?
faq.a9: Yes. Use the chat edit feature to describe changes in natural language — for example, 'replace the sofa with a darker one' or 'add plants near the window'. Vista regenerates with your feedback.
faq.q10: How is Vista different from other room design apps?
faq.a10: Unlike generic room design apps, Vista uses real, purchasable furniture from local stores — not imagined products. Every item in your design has a real price and a link to buy it. Vista is especially useful if you want to actually furnish your room with the products shown.
faq.stillHaveDesc: Our team is happy to help. Reach out and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

priceQuote.title: Get a price quote
priceQuote.description: We'll send your price quote to {email}. Add a preferred contact number below if you'd like us to reach you another way.
priceQuote.successBody: Thanks! We've received your request and will email your price quote to {email} soon.
priceQuote.error: We couldn't send your request. Please try again in a moment.

supportModal.title: We need a moment to fix this
supportModal.description: Our design service needs a quick fix. Our team has already been notified — please contact us and we'll help you right away.
supportModal.emailBody:
Hi Tunzone team,

I tried to generate a design in Vista but the service wasn't available. Could you help me continue?

Thank you.
supportModal.whatsappMessage: Hi! I tried to generate a design in Vista but the service wasn't available. Can you help me?
